tables.title: Sample of Teen Mental Health Data
tables.description: A random sample of 10 rows to provide a quick look at individual records and their structure across demographics, behaviors, and mental health indicators.

tables.title: Summary Statistics of Numeric Variables
tables.description: Descriptive statistics (mean, std, min, max, quartiles) for all numeric variables such as age, daily_social_media_hours, sleep_hours, screen_time_before_sleep, academic_performance, physical_activity, stress_level, anxiety_level, addiction_level, and depression_label.

tables.title: Frequency of Categorical Variables
tables.description: Frequency counts for key categorical variables: gender, platform_usage, and social_interaction_level, to understand the sample composition and behavioral modes.

tables.title: Depression Prevalence by Gender, Age Group, and Platform Usage
tables.description: A cross-tab showing the frequency of depression_label across combinations of gender, age (binned groups), and platform usage. Highlights prevalence patterns among major demographic and behavioral groups.
